api_endpoints: POST /api/collections/[collection]/write — guarded document writes
GET /api/collections/[collection]/read — document reads with location filter

GET /api/replication/status — document counts + checksums per collection
POST /api/replication/server-ready — server readiness broadcast (loopback only)
POST /api/replication/reset — full database reset broadcast (loopback only)
GET /api/replication/stream — multiplexed SSE for all collections + broadcasts
POST /api/replication/sync-check — client sync health report submission
GET /api/replication/sync-check — read all client sync reports
PUT /api/replication/sync-check — trigger all clients to run sync check
POST /api/replication/ping-chat — network diagnostic message send
GET /api/replication/ping-chat — SSE stream for diagnostic messages
POST /api/replication/client-log — client-to-server log forwarding
GET /api/device/identify — server IP/hostname/epoch for device identity
POST /api/device/identify — device re-identification via hardware fingerprint
GET /api/device/clients — all tracked client connections
POST /api/device/route — lightweight route reporter (sendBeacon)
GET /api/sse/kitchen-orders — branch kitchen order SSE stream
GET /api/sse/aggregate — multi-branch kitchen SSE aggregator
POST /api/events/kitchen-push — kitchen snapshot broadcast
POST /api/pos/transfer — atomic table-to-table order transfer
POST /api/reports/x-read — BIR X-Read generation from server snapshot
POST /api/admin/save-floor-seed — export floor layout to seed file (dev only)
